must_detect.matched_text:
Counterparties: Brighthold Capital Sarl and Opal Bridge Holdings BV propose a minority strategic investment with an exclusive call option for a further stake in the issuer.
Scope: non-binding term sheet for equity subscription and commercial partnership relating to the LumenEdge platform and AuroraFlux cells (product names only).
Public information: structure and indicative timetable align with the issuer’s already announced Strategic Pathway Update dated 03‑01‑2025 available on the public website.
EU MAR: no inside information will be provided until wall-crossing; any delayed disclosure under Article 17 will be recorded and managed per the internal MAR Policy “North Star Playbook.”
GDPR: personal data processing limited to deal execution; special-category data will be minimised and redacted; cross-border transfers outside the EEA rely on SCCs with a transfer impact assessment filed in the Data Room.
Data Subject (special category): HR Record Employee Ref EZ-0441 (R&D technician) has a documented oncology treatment accommodation; any such health data will be excluded from cross-border disclosure and replaced with functional anonymisation.
Sustainability: parties target alignment with the issuer’s CSRD double materiality assessment and self-declared SFDR Art. 8 product framework “Atlas GreenBond Framework,” without representations as to taxonomy alignment.
Regulatory approvals: completion is subject to clearance from the Fictional National Competition Authority and a non-controlling foreign investment review at the Veldhaven Economic Council (both fictional bodies).
Governance: no board changes at signing; observer rights only, and no access to undisclosed quarterly management packs prior to cleansed wall-crossing.
